title: Loafer
subTitle: Bikram is a selfless man who is unfairly hated by his family. However, after an arrest for helping a friend marry, he struggles to gain the respect of those he constantly protects.

title: Mr. Perfect
subTitle: Vicky breaks his engagement with Priya, his childhood friend, after he learns that she is making many compromises for his sake. However, time makes him realise the need for compromises in life.

title: Bengal Tiger
subTitle: Circumstances turn dire for Vishal, an insouciant cop, when he is appointed as the inspector to an area reigned over by a terrifying criminal, Rukavat Singh, and his two cruel subordinates.

title: Patanjali Yog - By Yogrishi Swami Ramdev
subTitle: Baba Ramdev emphasises the importance of yoga and demonstrates various asanas and breathing exercises that enable one to lead a healthy and stress-free life.

title: Esho Maa Lakshmi
subTitle: A tale of Goddess Lakshmi that describes her divine origin, celestial beauty, and role as the bestower of wealth and prosperity in Hindu mythology.

title: Noyonmoni
subTitle: Nayan's house catches fire after he is born, which makes people believe that he is a bad omen. His life changes drastically when his father is arrested.

title: Abhagini
subTitle: Abhagini is tortured by her stepmother all her life, but she decides to make a new start after leaving the city. Initially, the new family she is living with dislikes her, but she soon wins them over.

title: Sindoor Niye Khela
subTitle: Varsha is a powerful businesswoman, but faces opposition from her workers. In order to solve the problem, she marries the leader of the worker's union.

title: Mangaldeep
subTitle: Two best friends, Mangal and Deep, embark on a journey to the big city to fulfil their musical dreams. In his quest to see Deep succeed, Mangal risks everything, including his own finances.

title: Putrabadhu
subTitle: The members of a joint family go through various ups and downs in their lives and attempt to stay together despite all the odds stacked against them.

title: Shapath Nilam
subTitle: Sukanta is shattered when his wife, Minu, is raped on their honeymoon. Though his wife fails to recognise him after the incident, her twin sister, Debu, tries to find the culprit.

title: Asha-O-Bhalobasa
subTitle: Bijoy is jailed after being framed by Bilas Dutta, a famous businessman, and unable to deal with it, his sister commits suicide. When he is released from prison, Bijoy vows to seek revenge.

title: Badnam
subTitle: Mathur Ghosh's cruelty drives Haranath to suicide. Years later, Haranath's son Shankar grows up determined to avenge his father's death by seeking justice against the evil Mathur Ghosh.

title: Tomai Pabo Bole
subTitle: Two neighbouring families are embroiled in a bitter rivalry. However, in an interesting turn of events, the son of one family falls in love with the daughter of the other.

title: Suorani Duorani
subTitle: The king of Kishangarh marries a girl, unaware that she is a demoness. Upon learning the truth about his stepmother, the prince decides to save his father and their kingdom from her evil plans.

title: Pratham Dekha
subTitle: Two struggling singers, who hope to make their way to the top, fall in love and fight to stay together amidst various societal barriers.

title: Bandie
subTitle: Unable to conceive an heir, Maharaja Brajbhan and his wife are forced to abdicate the throne for his cousin, Vikram. Chaos ensues when Vikram learns that the queen is pregnant and decides to kill her.
